title: Group By <alias> not working
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test1(a int, b varchar(20));
INSERT INTO test1(a, b) VALUES (1, 'one'), (2, 'two'), (3, NULL);
SELECT a AS alias_a FROM test1 GROUP BY a;
CREATE TABLE test2(c float, d int);
INSERT INTO test2(c, d) VALUES (1.5, 1), (2.5, NULL), (3.0, 2);
SELECT COALESCE(d, 0) AS alias_d, SUM(c) FROM test2 GROUP BY COALESCE(d, 0);
key_bug_features: Group By with alias not functioning correctly
